Anchor: Taxicab - Wikipedia
Snippet: A taxicab, also known as a taxi or a cab, is a type of vehicle for hire with a driver, used by a single passenger or small group of passengers, often for a non-shared ride. A taxicab conveys passengers between locations of their choice.

Anchor: How to Hail a Taxi: 12 Steps (with Pictures) - wikiHow
Snippet: Step onto the curb or the edge of the sidewalk. Do not stand in the road or you may get hit by other vehicles. Look for an available taxi. An available taxi will have its number illuminated. Raise your arm high to signal the driver.
